scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! May I see your passport and booking confirmation?
Do you have a seat preference? Window or aisle?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좌석 선호가 있으신가요? 창가 아니면 통로?

choices.text: I want to sit on the wing.

scenes.npcDialog: How many bags are you checking in today?

choices.text: I want to check in myself.

scenes.npcDialog: Please place your laptop and liquids in a separate tray.
Please step aside. Do you have anything metal in your pockets?

choices.text: Oh, I forgot my belt. Let me remove it.
I might have some coins. Here they are.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you find something?

choices.text: I'm looking for my gate. It's gate 25.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to see anything in particular?
We're now boarding rows 20 to 35. May I see your boarding pass?
Can I help you find your seat?
Let me help you with your bag. Is this your carry-on?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 가방 넣는 것 도와드릴게요. 이게 기내용 가방인가요?

scenes.npcDialog: What would you like to drink? We have juice, water, coffee, and tea.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 음료는 뭘로 드릴까요? 주스, 물, 커피, 차가 있습니다.

scenes.npcDialog: For your meal, would you like beef or chicken?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 식사로 소고기와 닭고기 중 뭘로 드릴까요?

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else I can get for you?

choices.text: Could I get a blanket, please?
I want to sleep in first class.

scenes.npcDialog: Excuse me, the seatbelt sign is on. Could you wait a moment?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 죄송합니다, 안전벨트 사인이 켜져있어요. 잠시 기다려주시겠어요?

choices.text: Okay, I'll go back to my seat.
I don't care about the sign.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need help filling out the arrival card?

choices.text: Yes, what should I write for 'purpose of visit'?
Where do I write my hotel address?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like headphones for the entertainment system?

choices.text: That would be great, thank you.

scenes.npcDialog: Please return to your seat and fasten your seatbelt. We're experiencing turbulence.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좌석으로 돌아가 안전벨트를 매주세요. 난기류가 있습니다.

choices.text: Okay, I'll sit down right away.
Is it going to be a rough ride?

scenes.npcDialog: We'll be landing in 30 minutes. Please put your tray table up and seat in the upright position.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 30분 후 착륙합니다. 테이블을 접고 좌석을 바로 세워주세요.

choices.text: Okay, thank you for letting me know.

scenes.situation: 아시아의 허브 공항 홍콩에 도착했다. 활기찬 분위기와 다양한 상점들.
scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to Hong Kong! Transfer this way. You have 3 hours - try our famous dim sum or explore Sky Bridge!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 홍콩에 오신 것을 환영합니다! 환승은 이쪽으로요. 3시간 있어요 - 유명한 딤섬 드시거나 스카이 브릿지 구경하세요!

choices.text: M̀h'gōi! Dim sum sounds amazing. Where can I find it?
choices.feedback: 광동어로 감사를 표현하며 딤섬 위치를 물어봅니다.

choices.text: What's the Sky Bridge? That sounds interesting!

scenes.situation: 정통 홍콩 딤섬을 맛보려 한다. 하가우, 슈마이 등 다양한 메뉴가 있다.
scenes.npcDialog: Dim sum! We have har gow - shrimp dumpling, siu mai - pork dumpling, char siu bao - BBQ pork bun. Very fresh, made here!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 딤섬이요! 하가우 - 새우만두, 슈마이 - 돼지고기 만두, 차슈바오 - 바베큐 돼지고기 빵 있어요. 아주 신선해요, 여기서 만들어요!

choices.text: I'd love to try har gow and char siu bao! What tea goes well with dim sum?
choices.feedback: 딤섬과 함께 마실 차를 물어보는 것이 좋습니다.

choices.text: Can I get a sampler plate with different types?
choices.feedback: 다양한 종류를 시도하고 싶어하는 합리적인 요청입니다.
홍콩에서 딤섬을 거부하는 것은 아쉬운 선택입니다.

choices.text: Is this authentic or airport food?

scenes.situation: 홍콩 공항 면세점을 둘러본다. 전자제품과 화장품이 유명하다.
scenes.npcDialog: Electronics very cheap here! Latest phones, cameras, all genuine. Also cosmetics - Korean and Japanese brands, good price!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 전자제품 아주 저렴해요! 최신 폰, 카메라, 전부 정품. 화장품도 - 한국, 일본 브랜드, 좋은 가격!

choices.text: What are the best deals right now? Any airport exclusives?
choices.feedback: 특별 할인이나 공항 한정 상품을 물어봅니다.

choices.text: Do these electronics come with international warranty?
I'll just look online for better prices.
Hong Kong electronics are probably counterfeit.

scenes.situation: 다음 비행기 탑승 시간이다. 홍콩의 활기찬 분위기가 인상적이었다.
scenes.npcDialog: Now boarding. Thank you for visiting Hong Kong. Joigin! Hope to see you for a longer visit next time!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 탑승을 시작합니다. 홍콩을 방문해주셔서 감사합니다. 재견! 다음엔 더 오래 계시길 바라요!

choices.text: The dim sum was incredible! I'll definitely come back to explore the city!
Joigin! This was a great layover, Hong Kong is amazing!

scenes.npcDialog: What is the purpose of your visit?
How long will you be staying?

choices.text: I'll be here for two weeks.

scenes.npcDialog: Where will you be staying?

choices.text: I'm staying at the Hilton Hotel.
At a hotel in the city center.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have a return ticket?

choices.text: Yes, I'm flying back on the 15th.

scenes.npcDialog: Which carousel is your luggage on?

choices.text: I'm not sure. My flight was from Seoul.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there a problem with your luggage?

choices.text: Yes, my bag hasn't come out yet.
I can't find my suitcase. It's a black one.

scenes.npcDialog: How much would you like to exchange?

choices.text: Can I exchange 300 dollars to euros?

scenes.npcDialog: Today's rate is 1.08 euros per dollar. Is that okay?
How can I help you today?

choices.text: How do I get to the city center?
What's the best way to get downtown?

scenes.npcDialog: Where would you like to go?

choices.text: One ticket to Central Station, please.
How much is a ticket to the city center?

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Do you have a reservation?

choices.text: Yes, I have a reservation under Kim.
Yes, I booked online. Here's my confirmation.
No, but give me the best room.

scenes.npcDialog: Your room includes breakfast. It's served from 7 to 10 AM.

choices.text: Great, where is the breakfast room?
Perfect, thank you for the information.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else you need?

choices.text: Could you tell me the WiFi password?

scenes.npcDialog: Sawadee ka! The Emerald Buddha is Thailand's most sacred image. Please dress respectfully - no shorts or sleeveless. Cover your shoulders!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 사와디카! 에메랄드 부처는 태국에서 가장 신성해요. 복장 조심하세요 - 반바지, 민소매 안 돼요. 어깨 가리세요!

choices.text: I brought a cover-up. The temple is beautiful!
What's the history of the Emerald Buddha?
I don't want to cover up.

scenes.npcDialog: Wat Arun - Temple of Dawn! Best at sunset actually - the light makes the porcelain tiles glow! You can climb the steep stairs to the top.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 왓 아룬 - 새벽 사원이에요! 사실 일몰이 제일 예뻐요 - 빛이 도자기 타일을 빛나게 해요! 가파른 계단 타고 꼭대기에 갈 수 있어요.

choices.text: The tiles are beautiful! I'll climb up for sunset.
Temple of Dawn at sunset - that's ironic and beautiful!

scenes.npcDialog: MBK Center has everything! Electronics, clothes, phone accessories. Bargaining is okay here too! 8 floors of shopping. Start from top!
scenes.npcDialogKo: MBK 센터에 다 있어요! 전자제품, 옷, 폰 악세서리. 여기도 흥정 가능해요! 8층 쇼핑. 위에서 시작하세요!

choices.text: 8 floors! I better wear comfortable shoes.
Good to know I can bargain here too!

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! What adventure are you looking for today?

choices.text: What extreme sports do you offer?
I want to try something exciting! What do you recommend?

scenes.npcDialog: Hold on tight! We're entering the rapids!

choices.text: This is amazing! What do I do if I fall out?
I'm holding on! This is so fun!
I don't want to get wet.

scenes.npcDialog: Keep quiet and don't make sudden movements.

choices.text: I understand. What animals might we see?
This is so exciting! Can I take photos?
I want to touch the animals.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! You booked a 6-bed dorm, right? Here's your locker key.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 환영합니다! 6인실 도미토리 예약하셨죠? 여기 락커 키입니다.

choices.text: Yes, that's correct. Where is my bed?
I want a private room now.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need help with the bus?

choices.text: Which bus goes to the old town?
How much is the bus fare?

scenes.npcDialog: The Grand Palace was home to Thai kings for 150 years! The architecture mixes Thai, Chinese, and European styles. Very unique!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 왕궁은 150년간 태국 왕들의 집이었어요! 건축이 태국, 중국, 유럽 스타일이 섞여 있어요. 아주 독특해요!

choices.text: The gold details are stunning! Still royal residence?
I love the mix of styles! Very unique indeed.

scenes.npcDialog: Tom Yum Goong! Spicy and sour with big prawns! How spicy you want? Thai spicy or foreigner spicy? Thai spicy is VERY hot!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 톰얌꿍! 큰 새우 들어간 맵고 신 수프예요! 얼마나 맵게요? 태국 스타일? 외국인 스타일? 태국 스타일은 아주 매워요!

choices.text: I'll try Thai spicy! I love a challenge!
Foreigner spicy please - I want to taste the flavors!
I don't like spicy food at all.
Soup is not a real meal.

scenes.npcDialog: Khao San Road! Backpacker paradise! Street food, cheap beer, live music! Try the fried insects - crickets are crunchy! Very protein!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 카오산 로드! 배낭여행자 천국! 길거리 음식, 싼 맥주, 라이브 음악! 곤충 튀김 드셔보세요 - 귀뚜라미가 바삭해요! 단백질 많아요!

choices.text: I'll try the crickets! When in Thailand!
The atmosphere here is amazing! What's the best beer?

scenes.npcDialog: Here's your helmet and harness. Let me help you put it on.

choices.text: How do I know if it's properly secured?

scenes.npcDialog: Lean back and enjoy the view as you zip across!

choices.text: This is incredible! How fast am I going?
Woohoo! Can I do it again?

scenes.npcDialog: Need help setting up your tent?

choices.text: Yes please! I've never camped before.
Which side faces into the wind?
I'd rather stay in a hotel.

scenes.npcDialog: The shared kitchen is on the first floor. Do you have any questions?

choices.text: Can I store food in the fridge?
What time does the kitchen close?

scenes.npcDialog: Are you looking for something?

choices.text: Is the museum within walking distance?
How long does it take to walk there?

scenes.npcDialog: Pad Thai! Thailand's famous noodle! Shrimp or chicken? I add peanuts, lime, chili. Not too spicy for foreigner, na ka?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 팟타이! 태국 유명한 국수예요! 새우? 치킨? 땅콩, 라임, 고추 넣어요. 외국인이라 안 맵게 해드릴까요?

choices.text: Shrimp please! And I can handle some spice!
What makes your pad thai special?

scenes.npcDialog: Asiatique is Bangkok's best night market! On the river, very romantic. Shops, restaurants, Ferris wheel! Free boat from Saphan Taksin!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 아시아티크는 방콕 최고 야시장이에요! 강변이라 아주 로맨틱해요. 상점, 레스토랑, 대관람차! 사판 탁신에서 무료 보트!

choices.text: Free boat ride! What time is the last one back?
A Ferris wheel by the river sounds magical!

scenes.npcDialog: Jim Thompson revived Thai silk industry! His house is a museum now - beautiful teak buildings. He mysteriously disappeared in 1967!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 짐 톰슨이 태국 실크 산업을 부활시켰어요! 그의 집이 지금 박물관이에요 - 아름다운 티크 건물. 1967년에 미스터리하게 사라졌어요!

choices.text: The teak house is beautiful! Is silk sold here?
I'm not interested in old houses.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have any health conditions we should know about?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 저희가 알아야 할 건강 상태가 있나요?

choices.text: No, I'm healthy and in good shape.
I have a slight heart condition. Is it still safe?

scenes.npcDialog: The trail gets steeper from here. How are you feeling?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 여기서부터 길이 더 가팔라져요. 상태는 어떠세요?

choices.text: I'm good! How much further to the summit?
A bit tired but let's keep going!

scenes.npcDialog: Are you okay? What happened?

choices.text: I twisted my ankle. Do you have a first aid kit?
I got stung by something. It's swelling.

scenes.npcDialog: Is this your first time at a hostel?

choices.text: Yes, where are the shared bathrooms?
Where can I take a shower?

scenes.npcDialog: We have a free walking tour starting at 10 AM. Interested?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 오전 10시에 무료 워킹투어가 있어요. 관심 있으세요?

choices.text: Yes! How long is the tour?
If it's free, it's probably bad.

scenes.npcDialog: Tuk tuk! Where you go? 100 baht to Khao San Road! Fast and fun, better than taxi in traffic. You like sightseeing on the way?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 툭툭! 어디 가세요? 카오산 로드까지 100바트! 교통체증에 택시보다 빠르고 재밌어요. 가면서 구경할래요?

choices.text: Can we negotiate? How about 80 baht?

scenes.npcDialog: Chao Phraya Express Boat! Only 15 baht, beats the traffic! Stops at Grand Palace, Wat Arun, many piers. Hold on tight, it's fast!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 차오프라야 익스프레스 보트! 15바트면 교통체증 안 걸려요! 왕궁, 왓 아룬, 많은 선착장에 서요. 꽉 잡아요, 빨라요!

choices.text: 15 baht! That's so cheap! Which pier for Wat Arun?
Traveling by river is so unique! I love it.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to the sky! 63rd floor views of Bangkok. Famous from Hangover 2 movie! Dress code: smart casual. No shorts or sandals please.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 하늘에 오신 걸 환영해요! 63층에서 방콕 야경을. 행오버 2에서 유명해졌어요! 복장: 스마트 캐주얼. 반바지, 샌들 안 돼요.

choices.text: The Hangover 2! I remember that scene! What cocktail do you recommend?
The view is incredible! Worth dressing up for.

scenes.npcDialog: Listen carefully to the safety briefing before we start.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 시작하기 전에 안전 설명을 잘 들어주세요.

choices.text: I'm listening carefully. What's the most important thing?
Got it. Can you repeat the emergency signals?

scenes.npcDialog: Use the holds carefully. I've got you on belay.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 홀드를 조심히 사용하세요. 빌레이 잡고 있어요.

choices.text: Got it! How do I get past this overhang?
My arms are burning but I'm almost there!

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need emergency assistance?

choices.text: Yes! My friend is injured and can't walk.
Please call for help! We're stuck on the cliff.

scenes.npcDialog: Your ticket includes only cabin baggage. Do you have checked luggage?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 티켓에는 기내 수하물만 포함되어 있어요. 위탁 수하물 있으세요?

choices.text: How much extra for checked baggage?
I only have carry-on, so I'm fine.

scenes.npcDialog: Cooking tonight? There's a supermarket around the corner.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 오늘 저녁 요리하세요? 코너 돌면 슈퍼마켓 있어요.

choices.text: Great! Do they have fresh vegetables?
Cooking is a waste of time.

scenes.npcDialog: Chatuchak has 15,000 stalls! Clothes, antiques, pets, food - everything! Start early, it gets hot. Don't forget to bargain!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 짜뚜짝에 15,000개 점포가 있어요! 옷, 골동품, 애완동물, 음식 - 다 있어요! 일찍 시작하세요, 더워져요. 흥정 잊지 마세요!

choices.text: I love bargaining! What's a good starting offer?

scenes.npcDialog: Green, red, or yellow curry? Green is coconut and basil - most popular! Red is spicier, yellow is milder. All come with jasmine rice!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 그린, 레드, 옐로우 커리? 그린은 코코넛과 바질 - 가장 인기! 레드가 더 맵고, 옐로우가 순해요. 다 재스민 라이스랑 나와요!

choices.text: Green curry please! I love coconut and basil.
What meat options do you have?
Curry is too spicy for me.

scenes.npcDialog: BTS Skytrain is air-conditioned and fast! Buy Rabbit card for discounts. Connects malls, hotels, river. Avoid rush hour - very crowded!
scenes.npcDialogKo: BTS 스카이트레인은 에어컨에 빨라요! 래빗 카드 사면 할인돼요. 쇼핑몰, 호텔, 강 연결해요. 러시아워 피하세요 - 아주 혼잡해요!

choices.text: Air-conditioned! Perfect for Bangkok heat. Where do I get a Rabbit card?
The train runs above traffic - so efficient!

scenes.npcDialog: This activity requires signing a waiver. Do you have insurance?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 이 활동은 서약서 서명이 필요해요. 보험 있으세요?

choices.text: Yes, I have travel insurance that covers adventure sports.
Insurance is a waste of money.

scenes.npcDialog: Paddle hard and pop up when you feel the wave!

choices.text: I did it! I'm actually surfing!

scenes.npcDialog: What can I get for you?

choices.text: One kebab, please. How much is it?
What's the cheapest thing on the menu?
Is this food safe to eat?

scenes.npcDialog: Regular admission is 15 euros.

choices.text: Do you have any free admission days?

scenes.npcDialog: Mango sticky rice! Best Thai dessert! Fresh mango, coconut cream, sweet sticky rice. We pick mango fresh every morning. Very sweet, very good!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 망고 스티키 라이스! 최고의 태국 디저트예요! 신선한 망고, 코코넛 크림, 달콤한 찹쌀. 매일 아침 망고를 따요. 아주 달고 맛있어요!

choices.text: The mango looks perfect! I'll take one!
Fresh every morning! That's why it's so delicious.

scenes.npcDialog: Muay Thai - the art of eight limbs! Fists, elbows, knees, shins all weapons. Very exciting! Ringside or regular seats? Ringside is close!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 무에타이 - 여덟 가지 무기의 예술! 주먹, 팔꿈치, 무릎, 정강이 다 무기예요. 아주 신나요! 링사이드? 일반석? 링사이드가 가까워요!

choices.text: Ringside please! I want to see the action up close!
Eight limbs! The technique must be incredible.

scenes.npcDialog: Last night in Bangkok! Let me recommend the best - larb salad, massaman curry, mango sticky rice for dessert. Chok dee ka - good luck!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 방콕 마지막 밤이네요! 추천해드릴게요 - 랍 샐러드, 마싸만 커리, 디저트로 망고 스티키 라이스. 촉 디 카 - 행운을 빌어요!

choices.text: I'll have it all! A perfect Thai feast!
Chok dee! This trip has been amazing.
I want Western food for my last night.

scenes.npcDialog: Ready to jump from 15,000 feet?

choices.text: Yes! I'm so nervous but excited!
Let's do this! How long is the freefall?

scenes.npcDialog: Run off the cliff and we'll glide together!

choices.text: This is the most amazing view I've ever seen!
I can't believe I'm flying! How do we steer?
I can't jump off a cliff.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! Would you like a meal or just a sandwich?

choices.text: How much is the value meal?

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for luggage storage?

choices.text: Yes, how much for a small locker?
I'll just leave it on the floor.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! Thai massage is 2,000 years old! We stretch and press energy lines. One hour or two hours? First time? Start with one hour, ka.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 환영해요! 태국 마사지는 2,000년 역사예요! 스트레칭하고 에너지 라인을 눌러요. 1시간? 2시간? 처음이면 1시간으로 시작하세요.

choices.text: One hour sounds perfect. Is it painful?
2,000 years of tradition! I'm excited to try.
I don't like strangers touching me.

scenes.npcDialog: Wat Pho has the Reclining Buddha - 46 meters long! The feet are inlaid with mother of pearl. Also birthplace of Thai massage!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 왓 포에 와불상이 있어요 - 46미터예요! 발에 자개가 박혀 있어요. 태국 마사지 발상지이기도 해요!

choices.text: 46 meters! That's huge! Can I see the feet up close?
Birthplace of Thai massage! Do they offer massages here?
Buddha statues are all the same.

scenes.npcDialog: Step to the edge. Jump on three!

choices.text: Here I go! One... two... three!
Oh my god, this is terrifying but amazing!

scenes.npcDialog: Paddle on alternate sides to go straight.

choices.text: Got it! This is so peaceful.

scenes.npcDialog: Will that be all?

choices.text: Yes, and can you heat this up for me?
Do you have any meal deals?
This is too expensive for a convenience store.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you with anything?

choices.text: I just want WiFi, no food.

scenes.npcDialog: Remember your hand signals underwater. Ready to dive?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 수중 수신호 기억하세요. 다이빙할 준비 됐나요?

choices.text: Yes! How deep are we going?
I'm ready. Will we see any sharks?

scenes.npcDialog: Stay close and watch your head. The ceiling gets low here.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 가까이 붙고 머리 조심하세요. 천장이 낮아져요.

choices.text: This is incredible! How old is this cave?
I'll be careful. Are there any underground rivers?

scenes.npcDialog: This souvenir is 20 euros.

choices.text: Can you give me a discount? How about 15?
Just give it to me for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Front desk, how may I help you?

choices.text: The air conditioning in my room isn't working.
I can't figure out how to adjust the temperature.

scenes.npcDialog: Housekeeping, can I help you?

choices.text: Could I get some extra towels, please?
I need more towels for my room.

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! How can I assist you today?

choices.text: Could I get a late checkout?

scenes.npcDialog: Are you checking out today?

choices.text: Yes, I'd like to check out.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like us to store your luggage?

choices.text: Yes, I'll pick it up around 3 PM.
That would be great. My flight is this evening.

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Table for how many?
Are you ready to order?

choices.text: Yes, I'll have the pasta, please.
Could I have a few more minutes?

scenes.npcDialog: What would you like to drink?

choices.text: I'll have a glass of water, please.
Could I see the wine list?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have any food allergies?
Can I get you anything else?
How would you like to pay?

choices.text: Can I pay with credit card?

scenes.npcDialog: Where to?

choices.text: Can you take me to this address?

scenes.npcDialog: That'll be 25 euros.

choices.text: Here you go. Keep the change.

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you?

choices.text: One ticket to Central Station, please.
How much is a day pass?
I want to ride for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you with directions?

choices.text: Does this bus go to the museum?
Which bus goes to the city center?

scenes.npcDialog: Excuse me, are you lost?

choices.text: Yes, I'm looking for the train station.
Could you tell me how to get to the museum?

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! Where are you flying to today?

choices.text: I don't want to go home.

scenes.npcDialog: Last minute shopping? Can I help you find something?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 마지막 쇼핑하세요? 뭔가 찾는 거 도와드릴까요?

choices.text: I'm looking for some chocolate as a gift.
Do you have any local souvenirs?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need a customs declaration form?

choices.text: Yes, please. What do I need to declare?
Do I need to declare gifts I bought?
